    <;> ring_nf
    <;> simp [Real.exp_add, Real.exp_sub, Real.exp_log, Real.exp_mul, Real.exp_add, Real.exp_sub, Real.exp_log, Real.exp_mul]

  have h2₁ : Real.exp (2 * Real.log 5 - 4) = Real.exp (2 * Real.log 5) * Real.exp (-4) := by
    have h2₂ : Real.exp (2 * Real.log 5 - 4) = Real.exp (2 * Real.log 5 + (-4 : ℝ)) := by ring_nf

      rw [Real.exp_add]
      <;> ring_nf
    rw [h2₃]
    <;> ring_nf
  rw [h2₁]

have h3 : Real.exp (2 * Real.log 5) = 25 := by
  have h3₁ : Real.exp (2 * Real.log 5) = 25 := by
    have h3₂ : Real.exp (2 * Real.log 5) = Real.exp (Real.log (5 ^ 2)) := by
      have h3₃ : 2 * Real.log 5 = Real.log (5 ^ 2) := by
        rw [Real.log_pow]
        <;> norm_num
      rw [h3₃]
    rw [h3₂]
    have h3₄ : Real.exp (Real.log (5 ^ 2)) = (5 : ℝ) ^ 2 := by
      rw [Real.exp_log (by positivity)]
    rw [h3₄]
    <;> norm_num
  exact h3₁

have h4 : Real.exp (2 * Real.arctan 2 - 4) = Real.exp (2 * Real.arctan 2) * Real.exp (-4) := by
  have h4₁ : Real.exp (2 * Real.arctan 2 - 4) = Real.exp (2 * Real.arctan 2) * Real.exp (-4) := by

  rw [h4₁]

have h5 : Real.exp (2 * Real.log 5 - 4 + 2 * Real.arctan 2) = 25 * Real.exp (2 * Real.arctan 2 - 4) := by

actual_answer: ({p : ℕ | p.Prime ∧ p ≡ 1 [MOD 8]}, {p : ℕ | p.Prime ∧ p ≡ 5 [MOD 8]})
proposed_answer: ({p : ℕ | Nat.Prime p ∧ p > (2 : ℕ) ∧ p ≡ (1 : ℕ) [MOD (8 : ℕ)]}, {p : ℕ | Nat.Prime p ∧ p > (2 : ℕ) ∧ p ≡ (5 : ℕ) [MOD (8 : ℕ)]})
explanation:
have h_main₁ : {p : ℕ | p.Prime ∧ p ≡ 1 [MOD 8]} = {p : ℕ | Nat.Prime p ∧ p > 2 ∧ p ≡ 1 [MOD 8]} := by
  apply Set.ext
  intro p
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
  constructor
  · intro h
    have h₁ : p.Prime := h.1
    have h₂ : p ≡ 1 [MOD 8] := h.2
    have h₃ : p > 2 := by
      by_contra h₄

      have h₅ : p ≤ 2 := by linarith
      have h₆ : p = 2 := by
        have h₇ : p ≥ 2 := Nat.Prime.two_le h₁
        linarith
      rw [h₆] at h₂
      norm_num [Nat.ModEq] at h₂
      <;> contradiction
    have h₄ : Nat.Prime p := h₁
    exact ⟨h₄, h₃, h₂⟩
  · intro h
    have h₁ : Nat.Prime p := h.1
    have h₂ : p > 2 := h.2.1
    have h₃ : p ≡ 1 [MOD 8] := h.2.2
    have h₄ : p.Prime := h₁
    exact ⟨h₄, h₃⟩

have h_main₂ : {p : ℕ | p.Prime ∧ p ≡ 5 [MOD 8]} = {p : ℕ | Nat.Prime p ∧ p > 2 ∧ p ≡ 5 [MOD 8]} := by
  apply Set.ext
  intro p
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
  constructor
  · intro h
    have h₁ : p.Prime := h.1
    have h₂ : p ≡ 5 [MOD 8] := h.2
    have h₃ : p > 2 := by
      by_contra h₄

      have h₅ : p ≤ 2 := by linarith
      have h₆ : p = 2 := by
        have h₇ : p ≥ 2 := Nat.Prime.two_le h₁
        linarith
      rw [h₆] at h₂
      norm_num [Nat.ModEq] at h₂
      <;> contradiction
    have h₄ : Nat.Prime p := h₁
    exact ⟨h₄, h₃, h₂⟩
  · intro h
    have h₁ : Nat.Prime p := h.1
    have h₂ : p > 2 := h.2.1
    have h₃ : p ≡ 5 [MOD 8] := h.2.2
    have h₄ : p.Prime := h₁
    exact ⟨h₄, h₃⟩

have h_main : (({p : ℕ | p.Prime ∧ p ≡ 1 [MOD 8]}, {p : ℕ | p.Prime ∧ p ≡ 5 [MOD 8]}) : (Set ℕ) × (Set ℕ)) = (({p : ℕ | Nat.Prime p ∧ p > 2 ∧ p ≡ 1 [MOD 8]}, {p : ℕ | Nat.Prime p ∧ p > 2 ∧ p ≡ 5 [MOD 8]}) : (Set ℕ) × (Set ℕ)) := by
  simp_all [Prod.ext_iff]
  <;> aesop

apply h_main

have h_main : ∀ (a b c d : ℝ), (d = a ∧ b = -c ∨ d = b ∧ a = -c ∨ d = c ∧ a = -b) ↔ (a + b + c = d ∧ (a + b = 0 ∨ b + c = 0 ∨ c + a = 0)) := by
  intro a b c d
  constructor
  · 
    intro h
    have h₁ : a + b + c = d ∧ (a + b = 0 ∨ b + c = 0 ∨ c + a = 0) := by

      rcases h with (⟨h₂, h₃⟩ | ⟨h₂, h₃⟩ | ⟨h₂, h₃⟩)
      · 
        have h₄ : b = -c := by linarith
        have h₅ : a + b + c = a := by linarith
        have h₆ : a + b + c = d := by
          rw [h₂] at *
          linarith
        have h₇ : a + b = 0 ∨ b + c = 0 ∨ c + a = 0 := by
          have h₈ : b + c = 0 := by linarith
          exact Or.inr (Or.inl h₈)
        exact ⟨h₆, h₇⟩
      · 
        have h₄ : a = -c := by linarith
        have h₅ : a + b + c = b := by linarith
        have h₆ : a + b + c = d := by
          rw [h₂] at *
          linarith
        have h₇ : a + b = 0 ∨ b + c = 0 ∨ c + a = 0 := by
          have h₈ : c + a = 0 := by linarith
          exact Or.inr (Or.inr h₈)
        exact ⟨h₆, h₇⟩
      · 
        have h₄ : a = -b := by linarith
        have h₅ : a + b + c = c := by linarith
        have h₆ : a + b + c = d := by
          rw [h₂] at *
          linarith
        have h₇ : a + b = 0 ∨ b + c = 0 ∨ c + a = 0 := by
          have h₈ : a + b = 0 := by linarith
          exact Or.inl h₈
        exact ⟨h₆, h₇⟩
    exact h₁
  · 
    intro h
    have h₁ : d = a ∧ b = -c ∨ d = b ∧ a = -c ∨ d = c ∧ a = -b := by
      rcases h with ⟨h₂, h₃⟩
      have h₄ : a + b = 0 ∨ b + c = 0 ∨ c + a = 0 := h₃
      rcases h₄ with (h₄ | h₄ | h₄)
      · 
        have h₅ : a = -b := by linarith
        have h₆ : d = c := by
          have h₇ : a + b + c = d := h₂
          have h₈ : a + b = 0 := h₄
          have h₉ : c = d := by linarith

        have h₇ : d = c ∧ a = -b := by

explanation:
have h_main : ∀ n : ℕ, 2 ^ ⌊(n + 2) / 2⌋₊ + 2 ^ ⌊(n + 1) / 2⌋₊ - 2 = 2 ^ ((n + 1) / 2) + 2 ^ (n / 2 + 1) - 2 := by
  intro n
  have h₁ : 2 ^ ⌊(n + 2) / 2⌋₊ + 2 ^ ⌊(n + 1) / 2⌋₊ - 2 = 2 ^ ((n + 1) / 2) + 2 ^ (n / 2 + 1) - 2 := by
    have h₂ : ⌊(n + 2) / 2⌋₊ = (n + 2) / 2 := by
      simp [Nat.floor_eq_iff, Nat.div_eq_of_lt]
      <;>
      (try omega) <;>
      (try
        {
          cases n <;> simp_all [Nat.div_eq_of_lt, Nat.floor_eq_iff]
          <;> ring_nf at * <;> omega
        })
      <;>
      omega
    have h₃ : ⌊(n + 1) / 2⌋₊ = (n + 1) / 2 := by
      simp [Nat.floor_eq_iff, Nat.div_eq_of_lt]
      <;>
      (try omega) <;>
      (try
        {
          cases n <;> simp_all [Nat.div_eq_of_lt, Nat.floor_eq_iff]
          <;> ring_nf at * <;> omega
        })
      <;>
      omega
    rw [h₂, h₃]
    have h₄ : (n + 2) / 2 = n / 2 + 1 := by
      have h₅ : n % 2 = 0 ∨ n % 2 = 1 := by omega
      rcases h₅ with (h₅ | h₅)
      · 
        have h₆ : n = 2 * (n / 2) := by omega
        rw [h₆]
        <;> simp [Nat.mul_add, Nat.add_mul, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> omega
      · 
        have h₆ : n = 2 * (n / 2) + 1 := by omega
        rw [h₆]
        <;> simp [Nat.mul_add, Nat.add_mul, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> omega
    rw [h₄]
    <;> simp [Nat.pow_add, Nat.pow_one, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm]
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> omega
  exact h₁

have h_final : ((fun n : ℕ ↦ 2 ^ ⌊(n + 2) / 2⌋₊ + 2 ^ ⌊(n + 1) / 2⌋₊ - 2) : ℕ → ℕ) = (fun n : ℕ => 2 ^ ((n + 1) / 2) + 2 ^ (n / 2 + 1) - 2 : ℕ → ℕ) := by
  funext n
  rw [h_main n]
  <;> rfl

exact h_final

have h_main : Real.sqrt (Real.exp 1) = Real.exp ((1 : ℝ) / 2) := by
  have h₁ : Real.sqrt (Real.exp 1) = Real.exp ((1 : ℝ) / 2) := by

    have h₂ : Real.sqrt (Real.exp 1) = (Real.exp 1) ^ (1 / 2 : ℝ) := by
      rw [Real.sqrt_eq_rpow]
      <;> norm_num
    rw [h₂]

    have h₃ : (Real.exp 1 : ℝ) ^ (1 / 2 : ℝ) = Real.exp ((1 : ℝ) / 2) := by

      have h₄ : (Real.exp 1 : ℝ) ^ (1 / 2 : ℝ) = Real.exp (1 * (1 / 2 : ℝ)) := by
        rw [Real.rpow_def_of_pos (Real.exp_pos 1)]
        <;> field_simp [Real.exp_log]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> norm_num
        <;>
          simp_all [Real.exp_log]
        <;>
          ring_nf
        <;>
          norm_num
      rw [h₄]

      have h₅ : (1 : ℝ) * (1 / 2 : ℝ) = (1 : ℝ) / 2 := by ring
      rw [h₅]
      <;>
      simp [Real.exp_log]
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      norm_num
    rw [h₃]
    <;>
    ring_nf
    <;>
    norm_num
  exact h₁
exact h_main

  intro k n
  have h₁ : ((-k : ℝ) ^ n : ℝ) = (-1 : ℝ) ^ n * (k : ℝ) ^ n := by
    have h₂ : ∀ (n : ℕ), ((-k : ℝ) ^ n : ℝ) = (-1 : ℝ) ^ n * (k : ℝ) ^ n := by
      intro n

  <;> norm_num

  <;> ring_nf at *
  <;> simp_all [mul_assoc, mul_comm, mul_left_comm]
  <;> ring_nf at *
  <;> norm_num at *
  <;> linarith

have h_main : (fun k ↦ (k)! * (k + 1)! / ((3 * k + 1) * (2 * k)!) : ℕ → ℚ) = (fun k : ℕ => (↑(((k + 1) !) * (k !)) : ℚ) / (↑((2 * k) !) * (3 * k + 1)) : ℕ → ℚ) := by
  funext k
  have h₁ : ((k : ℕ)! * (k + 1)! : ℚ) / ((3 * k + 1 : ℚ) * ((2 * k)! : ℚ)) = ((↑(((k + 1) !) * (k !)) : ℚ) / (↑((2 * k) !) * (3 * k + 1)) : ℚ) := by
    have h₂ : ((k : ℕ)! * (k + 1)! : ℚ) = (↑(((k + 1) !) * (k !)) : ℚ) := by
      norm_cast
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> simp [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.mul_left_comm]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> norm_num
      <;> simp_all [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.mul_left_comm]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> norm_num
    rw [h₂]
    have h₃ : ((3 * k + 1 : ℚ) * ((2 * k)! : ℚ)) = (↑((2 * k) !) * (3 * k + 1) : ℚ) := by
      ring_nf
      <;> simp [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_zero]
      <;> field_simp
      <;> ring_nf
    rw [h₃]
    <;> field_simp
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> simp_all [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_zero]
    <;> field_simp
    <;> ring_nf
  exact h₁
exact h_main

actual_answer: {v : Fin 2 → ℤ | ∃ b : ℤ, 0 ≤ b ∧ b ≤ 100 ∧ Even b ∧ v = ![1, b]}
explanation:
have h_subset₁ : {v : Fin 2 → ℤ | ∃ b : ℤ, 0 ≤ b ∧ b ≤ 100 ∧ Even b ∧ v = ![1, b]} ⊆ {v : Fin 2 → ℤ | v (0 : Fin (2 : ℕ)) = 1 ∧ 0 ≤ v (1 : Fin (2 : ℕ)) ∧ v (1 : Fin (2 : ℕ)) ≤ 100 ∧ Even (v (1 : Fin (2 : ℕ)))} := by
  intro v hv
  rcases hv with ⟨b, hb₀, hb₁, hb₂, hv⟩
  have h₁ : v (0 : Fin (2 : ℕ)) = 1 := by
    rw [hv]
    <;> simp [Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_one, Matrix.head_cons]
    <;> norm_num
  have h₂ : 0 ≤ v (1 : Fin (2 : ℕ)) := by
    rw [hv]
    <;> simp [Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_one, Matrix.head_cons]
    <;> linarith
  have h₃ : v (1 : Fin (2 : ℕ)) ≤ 100 := by
    rw [hv]
    <;> simp [Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_one, Matrix.head_cons]
    <;> linarith
  have h₄ : Even (v (1 : Fin (2 : ℕ))) := by
    rw [hv]
    <;> simp [Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_one, Matrix.head_cons, Int.even_iff]
    <;> simp_all [Int.even_iff, Int.ModEq]
    <;> omega
  exact ⟨h₁, h₂, h₃, h₄⟩

have h_subset₂ : {v : Fin 2 → ℤ | v (0 : Fin (2 : ℕ)) = 1 ∧ 0 ≤ v (1 : Fin (2 : ℕ)) ∧ v (1 : Fin (2 : ℕ)) ≤ 100 ∧ Even (v (1 : Fin (2 : ℕ)))} ⊆ {v : Fin 2 → ℤ | ∃ b : ℤ, 0 ≤ b ∧ b ≤ 100 ∧ Even b ∧ v = ![1, b]} := by
  intro v hv
  have h₁ : v (0 : Fin (2 : ℕ)) = 1 := hv.1
  have h₂ : 0 ≤ v (1 : Fin (2 : ℕ)) := hv.2.1
  have h₃ : v (1 : Fin (2 : ℕ)) ≤ 100 := hv.2.2.1
  have h₄ : Even (v (1 : Fin (2 : ℕ))) := hv.2.2.2
  have h₅ : ∃ b : ℤ, 0 ≤ b ∧ b ≤ 100 ∧ Even b ∧ v = ![1, b] := by
    refine' ⟨v (1 : Fin (2 : ℕ)), _⟩
    have h₆ : v = ![1, v (1 : Fin (2 : ℕ))] := by
      have h₇ : v (0 : Fin (2 : ℕ)) = 1 := h₁
      have h₈ : v (1 : Fin (2 : ℕ)) ≤ 100 := h₃
      have h₉ : 0 ≤ v (1 : Fin (2 : ℕ)) := h₂
      have h₁₀ : Even (v (1 : Fin (2 : ℕ))) := h₄
      ext i
      fin_cases i <;> simp_all [Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_one, Matrix.head_cons]
      <;> try omega
      <;> try simp_all [Int.even_iff]
      <;> try omega
    refine' ⟨by linarith, by linarith, by simpa [Int.even_iff] using h₄, _⟩
    exact h₆
  exact h₅

have h_main : ({v : Fin 2 → ℤ | ∃ b : ℤ, 0 ≤ b ∧ b ≤ 100 ∧ Even b ∧ v = ![1, b]} : Set (Fin 2 → ℤ)) = ({v : Fin 2 → ℤ | v (0 : Fin (2 : ℕ)) = 1 ∧ 0 ≤ v (1 : Fin (2 : ℕ)) ∧ v (1 : Fin (2 : ℕ)) ≤ 100 ∧ Even (v (1 : Fin (2 : ℕ)))} : Set (Fin 2 → ℤ)) := by
  apply Set.Subset.antisymm
  · 
    exact h_subset₁
  · 
    exact h_subset₂

exact h_main
